lawyers.name: Mara Quint
lawyers.title: Partner, Injury & Claims
lawyers.summary: Handles people hurt in accidents — car crashes, slips and falls, workplace injuries. Methodical about the numbers: medical bills, lost wages, what a claim is actually worth. For someone who is injured, out of pocket, and trying to understand what they can recover.

lawyers.name: Elias Bench
lawyers.title: Partner, Litigation
lawyers.summary: Takes disputes to court when they cannot be settled — contract fights, professional negligence, partnership fallouts. Weighs the merits coldly before anyone files. For someone facing a lawsuit or deciding whether their grievance is worth pursuing.

lawyers.name: Delphine Ward
lawyers.title: Counsel, Criminal Defence
lawyers.summary: Defends people accused of crimes — charges, arrests, investigations, bail. Calm and direct under pressure, careful about what is said and when. For someone who has been charged or contacted by police and needs to know their rights right now.

lawyers.name: Tomas Rell
lawyers.title: Partner, Real Estate
lawyers.summary: Closes property matters — purchases, sales, leases, boundary and title disputes, landlord and tenant problems. Detail-driven about contracts and deadlines. For someone buying, selling, or fighting over a home or commercial property.

lawyers.name: Ingrid Saito
lawyers.title: Partner, Commercial
lawyers.summary: Advises businesses — company formation, shareholder agreements, commercial contracts, mergers and acquisitions. Pragmatic and deal-focused. For a founder or business owner structuring, growing, or protecting a company.
